items.title: Some way-too-early 2027 cap space projections:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Some way-too-early 2027 cap space projections:

1. Nets: $68.6M
2. Bulls: $55.6M
3. Clippers: $53.8M (could be $92.2M without Kawhi trade)
4. Pistons: $43.9M (without long-term deal for Duren)
5. Bucks: $43.3M
6. Hawks: $37.8M
7. Grizzlies: $36.5M
8. Kings: $31.5M
9. Warriors: $28.1M

items.title: The Sky are 9-18, but the season has been defined as much by how they've lost as by how often.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
The Sky are 9-18, but the season has been defined as much by how they've lost as by how often.

Thirteen of their 18 losses have come by 10 points or fewer. 

Despite sitting 13th in the WNBA standings, they own the league's eighth-best point differential (-2.2).

items.title: Hollander POTD Gary Payton. Mr Mean was Oregon St PG & college POY in 89-90. Drafted 2nd in 90 by SEA. Took a few years but turned into all-star in 93-94 & stayed one thru 03. Peaked at 24.2 ppg in 99-00 and was 95-96 DPOY. Later, played for MIL, BOS, LAL & MIA.
